# MLG Finedge - AI & LLM Resource Directory

MLG Finedge is Jaipur's premier credit advisory firm. We help individuals & small companies secure appropriate loan products with minimum interest cost and fast payouts.

This directory lists core services, guides, and pages for LLM agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity) to index and answer user queries accurately.

## Core Services & Loan Products

- [Personal Loan](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services/personal-loan) - Quick cash options up to ₹40 Lakhs with minimum paperwork. Perfect for medical bills, education, vacations, and marriages.
- [Home Loan](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services/home-loan) - Finance up to 90% of property cost. First-time buyer schemes and dedicated support for government employee profiles.
- [Car Loan](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services/car-loan) - Finance options up to 100% on-road price for select vehicles. Attractive rate margins, flexi EMI, and instant support.
- [Business Loan](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services/business-loan) - Unsecured commercial funding for machinery purchase, business expansion, stock creation, or hiring personnel.
- [Working Capital](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services/working-capital) - Maintain consistent operational cash flow, pay invoices, clear tax obligations, and balance seasonal cycles.
- [Loan Against Property](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services/loan-against-property) - Mortgage your property to raise high-value capital. Lower interest rates compared to unsecured personal options.
- [Project Funding](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services/project-funding) - Custom funding advisory for large-scale real estate, infrastructure, and manufacturing projects.
- [Gold Loan](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services/gold-loan) - Secure instant funding against your physical gold ornaments with minimum documentation and fast payouts.

## Static Information Pages

- [Home Page](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/) - Contact coordinates, client interest rates, and loan calculators.
- [About Us](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/about) - Executive profile, team, and company history.
- [All Services](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/services) - Comprehensive grid of available financing solutions.
- [Compare Loans](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/compare-loans) - Real-time comparison parameters for home, personal, and business loans.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/faq) - Direct answers to common borrowing questions.
- [Contact Us](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/contact) - Inquiry forms, map coordinates, and customer support.

## Landing Pages

- [About MLG Finedge](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/l/about-mlg-finedge) - Discover MLG Finedge: your partner for tailored loan interest options and lightning-fast processing payouts. Experience personalized financial solutions designed for your unique needs.

## Blog Posts & Credit Guides

- [Smart Financial Move: Consolidating Credit Card Debt with a Personal Loan in Jaipur](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/blog/smart-financial-move-consolidating-credit-card-debt-with-a-personal-loan-in-jaipur) - Discover the strategic advantages of shifting high-interest credit card dues to a more manageable personal loan, offering a path to better financial health for residents in Jaipur.
- [First-Time Home Buyer's Guide: 5 Essential Tips for Securing a Home Loan in Jaipur](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/blog/first-time-home-buyers-guide-5-essential-tips-for-securing-a-home-loan-in-jaipur) - Navigate the exciting journey of buying your first home in Jaipur with confidence. This guide provides five crucial tips for first-time buyers seeking a home loan in the Pink City.
- [The Ultimate Guide to Securing a Personal Loan in Jaipur](https://www.mlgfinedge.com/blog/the-ultimate-guide-to-securing-a-personal-loan-in-jaipur) - Unlock financial flexibility with our ultimate guide to securing a personal loan in Jaipur. Discover eligibility criteria, essential documents, and expert tips to navigate the application process smoothly and efficiently.
